articles.title: Aishi Expands Production Capacity by 30% to Meet Growing Global Demand
articles.summary: Aishi announces major capacity expansion at its manufacturing facilities, adding new automated production lines for aluminum electrolytic capacitors to support increasing demand from automotive and industrial markets.
articles.content: Aishi announced a significant expansion of its production capacity. The expansion includes the addition of 6 new automated production lines, representing a 30% increase in total manufacturing capacity. The company has invested approximately $50 million in the expansion project. The expansion is driven by strong demand growth across automotive electronics, industrial automation, renewable energy, and 5G infrastructure markets.

articles.title: Aishi Launches New Automotive-Grade Capacitor Series
articles.summary: New automotive series meets AEC-Q200 standards with 150C operation and exceptional reliability for next-generation automotive electronics.
articles.content: Aishi launched a new line of automotive-grade capacitors designed specifically for demanding automotive electronics. The series has successfully passed rigorous AEC-Q200 qualification testing. Key features include high temperature operation up to 150C, high ripple current capability, and long lifetime rated for 10000 hours at 150C.

articles.title: Aishi Achieves ISO 14001:2015 Environmental Management Certification
articles.summary: Aishi's commitment to environmental sustainability recognized with ISO 14001 certification.
articles.content: Aishi successfully achieved ISO 14001:2015 certification for its Environmental Management System. Environmental initiatives include solar power systems, comprehensive recycling programs, and VOC emission control systems. All products meet RoHS and REACH compliance requirements.

articles.title: Aishi Introduces Extended-Life Capacitor Series for LED Lighting
articles.summary: New extended life series delivers 50000-hour lifetime at 105C for LED driver applications.
articles.content: Aishi announced the introduction of extended life capacitors specifically designed for LED lighting applications. The series achieves 50000 hours rated lifetime at 105C through advanced materials and manufacturing processes. At lower temperatures, lifetime extends dramatically following the Arrhenius relationship.

articles.title: Aishi Showcases Latest Capacitor Innovations at Electronics Expo 2024
articles.summary: Aishi demonstrates new high-temperature capacitor series and power electronics solutions.
articles.content: Aishi participated in Electronics Expo 2024. The company showcased high-temperature aluminum electrolytic capacitors, automotive-grade capacitors with AEC-Q200 qualification, and compact SMD capacitors. Aishi also presented technical papers on advances in capacitor technology.

articles.title: Aishi Releases 2023 Sustainability Report Highlighting Environmental Progress
articles.summary: Annual sustainability report details achievements in carbon reduction and social responsibility.
articles.content: Aishi released its 2023 Sustainability Report detailing progress in environmental stewardship. Key achievements include 20% reduction in carbon emissions per unit of production, 15% improvement in energy efficiency, and 85% waste diversion from landfill. The company also donated $200,000 to local education initiatives.
